// purpose: MCP servers Claude Code should auto-start on session boot.
// schema: Each entry under mcpServers is a server definition; type=stdio uses the package's bin entry; type=http for HTTP transports.
// note: MCP servers are picked up at session start. A running session cannot self-load a new server -- changes here take effect next session.

chrome-devtools.// what: Drives a headless Chrome via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. Exposes screenshot, accessibility tree, network monitor, page navigation, console capture as MCP tools — tighter and faster than DOM scraping.
chrome-devtools.// when: Use when an audit / screenshot / a11y-tree task needs CDP-level access to the demo at fpkg.fly.dev.

govuk-sparql.// what: Exposes SPARQL queries against the local gov.uk org-chart corpus (third_party/govuk/html/orgcharts/extractors/factoids/all.nq). Two tools: sparql_query and sparql_describe. Wraps the rdflib-endpoint HTTP at 127.0.0.1:8765.
govuk-sparql.// when: Use when answering questions about UK ministerial roles / holders / departments / org chart. Start the endpoint first: ./scripts/govuk_sparql_serve.sh
